betOfDay.reasoning: Line locked at -17.5 to -18 across every major book — FanDuel, DraftKings, BetMGM, BetOnline, BetRivers, Bovada all agree. Milwaukee is clearly depleted this late in the season and the Celtics are one of the top teams in the East. Road chalk on a double-digit number needs strong consensus, and we have it. Back the Celtics to cover big.
